name: Ring of Minor Arcana
description: This rose-gold ring is adorned in the center by a somewhat ominous-looking horned skull. This ring gives you the power to cast the following innate arcane cantrips any number of times each day: , , and . Each is cast as a 1st-rank spell. If you are an arcane spellcaster, these can instead be heightened to the rank of your cantrips.
